description: Implement Universal Executor/Auditor Exchange Ledger Loop as roadmap step 10. Create governance/ledger-exchange-protocol.md defining the traceable loop mechanism for executor-auditor coordination through ledger entries.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap step 10 follows completed step 9 (AUDIT-AUTHORITY-LOCK-DEV-EXECUTION-LOCK). Previous steps 8-9 are completed per ledger tail. Next logical step is Universal Executor/Auditor Exchange Ledger Loop.
